narrative:
Jefferson County has 42,661 registered voters, with 59.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.8%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.3 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 31.5% of registrants.
